title: Lunch
content: Reminder that lunch is not at 12pm but is at 1pm.

title: Campfire Portal
content: Campfire Portal will be starting in 10 minutes in Room A, use this event as a time to connect with other Australian events.

title: Dinner meetup
content: Please come to the meeting room so we can decide on what to get for dinner. We are choosing between certain pizza from Dominos

title: Check-in form #1
content: Please complete the Check-in form #1 now. If you complete this form you will get dinner! One person from each team needs to fill it out. https://cfadelaide.fillout.com/checkin1. The password is pixel-rocket-lime.

title: Dinner
content: Dinner is ready, we have Dominos plus drinks.

title: Karaoke time!
content: We're getting ready for karaoke now! Please meet in Room A if you want to attend, otherwise continue working on your project :)

title: Check-in form #2
content: Please complete the Check-in form #2 now. If you complete this form you will get some free merchandise from Jane Street. One person from each team needs to fill it out. https://cfadelaide.fillout.com/checkin2. The password is velvet-mango-orbit.

title: Winding down
content: Begin to wind down, to allow others wanting to, to sleep otherwise please be quieter and work together. This will be the last annoucement for the day, unless there is a safety annoucement.

title: Morning annoucements.
content: Hope breakfast was good! Projects will be due in 4 hours at 2pm. Demos will begin then as well, so it's a good idea to begin packing up your team base like your sleeping bag.

title: Check-in form #3
content: Please complete the Check-in form #3 now. One person from each team needs to fill it out. https://cfadelaide.fillout.com/checkin3. The password is undercity-daydream-campfire.

title: Need help submitting?
content: Are you needing some help with submitting your project? Come to Room A at 12pm for some guidance in the 'Project Submission Masterclass!'.

title: Lunch
content: Lunch is ready, please come to the kitchen (Room B) and collect your food!

title: Projects are due ASAP!
content: This is your last reminder, projects are due at 2pm which is in 30 minutes!

title: Projects are now DUE
content: As of 2pm, this message serves as the notice that projects are now due and that the submission portal is closed.
